---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the Red Bank platform
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug, needs-triage'
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Reproduction Steps
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 🛑 Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened instead.

## 📸 Screenshots / Video
If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment Setup
Please complete the following information:
- **Device/OS**: [e.g., iPhone 14 Pro, Android 13, Windows 11]
- **App Version**: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- **Backend Environment**: [e.g., Local, Staging, Production]
- **Flutter Version**: [e.g., 3.19.0]
- **Spring Boot Version**: [e.g., 3.2.0]

## ⚡ Priority & Severity
- [ ] Low (Visual glitch, doesn't impact core functionality)
- [ ] Medium (Workaround exists, non-critical flow)
- [ ] High (Core feature broken, no workaround)
- [ ] Critical (App crash, data loss, emergency matching failed)

## ✅ Pre-flight Checklist
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines.
- [ ] I have verified this bug does not already exist in the open issues.
- [ ] I am using the latest version of the platform.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., stack traces, logs).
